goal: Define readiness fixtures and follow-on parity fixtures for cross-language interoperability and full-parity checks

args.query: MATCH (a)-[r:TESTS]->(b) RETURN a.name, b.name ORDER BY a.name ASC, b.name ASC
MATCH (a)-[r:TESTS_FILE]->(b) RETURN a.name, b.name ORDER BY a.name ASC, b.name ASC

args.content:
## PURPOSE
Persist ADRs.

## STACK
Zig and SQLite.

## ARCHITECTURE
Project-scoped ADR storage.

args.query: MATCH (n) WHERE n.label = "Function" RETURN count(n) AS count
MATCH (n) WHERE n.label = "Variable" RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC
MATCH (n) WHERE n.label = "Class" RETURN count(n) AS count

MATCH (a)-[r:USES_TYPE]->(b) RETURN a.name, b.name ORDER BY a.name, b.name
MATCH (a)-[r:IMPORTS]->(b) RETURN a.label, a.name, b.label, b.name ORDER BY a.name

MATCH (a)-[r:DEFINES]->(b) WHERE a.name = "lib.rs" AND b.label = "Field" RETURN b.name ORDER BY b.name

MATCH (n) WHERE n.label = 'Route' RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC
MATCH (a)-[r:HANDLES]->(b) RETURN a.name, b.name ORDER BY a.name, b.name
MATCH (a)-[r:DATA_FLOWS]->(b) WHERE a.name = 'fetch_users' RETURN a.name, b.name ORDER BY a.name, b.name
MATCH (n) WHERE n.qualified_name = '__route__celery__users.refresh' RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.name ASC
MATCH (a)-[r:ASYNC_CALLS]->(b) WHERE a.name = 'enqueue_users' RETURN a.name, b.name ORDER BY a.name, b.name

MATCH (n) WHERE n.name = 'DATABASE_URL' RETURN n.label, n.name, n.file_path ORDER BY n.label, n.file_path
